description_long: This is a single-story bungalow with a sprawling, L-shaped footprint and a low-pitched, multi-hipped roof in a muted greenish-gray color. The exterior walls are finished in a light beige or off-white, with subtle trim details around the windows and doors. The front entrance is accentuated by a small, protruding gabled section, suggesting a sheltered entryway. Windows are distributed asymmetrically, with some grouped together and others spaced apart, providing a varied facade. The structure appears to have an attached garage on one end, indicated by a large, paneled door. The overall design is simple and functional, typical of suburban residential neighborhoods.
description: A single-story, L-shaped bungalow with a low-pitched, multi-hipped greenish-gray roof and light beige exterior, featuring an attached garage and asymmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance with a small gabled section and the attached garage on the left.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the L-shaped layout and the extended rooflines.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade, garage door, and additional windows along the long side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other end of the L-shape and more window placements.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped and spaced windows
